maxUsesNumber.description:
Restriction of total coupon usages
0 infinitive

maxUsesPerUser.description:
Maximum number of uses per registered user
0 infinitive

memberId.description: Register coupon for a specific customer or organization

code.description: Currency code may be used ISO 4217.

isPrimary.description: Flag specifies that this is the primary currency

exchangeRate.description: The exchange rate against the primary exchange rate of the currency.

userGroups.description: Any tags or groups belongs to user such as VIP, Wholesaler etc

imageUrl.description: Gets or sets the image URL.
Gets or sets the image URL.

objectType.description: Gets or sets the type. E.g. "folder", "content-item", "content-place"

imageUrl.description: Gets or sets the image URL.

objectType.description: Gets or sets the type. E.g. "folder", "content-item", "content-place"

imageUrl.description: Gets or sets the image URL.

availableChildren.description: List of all available children for current tree node (is used in expression designer)

isAllowCombiningWithSelf.description:
If this flag is set to true, it allows this promotion to combine with itself.
Special for case when need to return same promotion rewards for multiple coupons

type.description: Required for UI. TODO: remove later

priority.description: Represents a promotion priority, for combination policies when it is necessary to select a promotion with a higher priority

isExclusive.description: If a promotion with this setting is applied, no other promotions can be applied to the order.

maxUsageOnOrder.description: Maximum redemptions on a single order

maxPersonalUsageCount.description: Maximum redemptions by a single customer

customerId.description:
Contains User Id.
This property will be deleted after update to .NET8. Use UserId property instead.

cartPromoEntries.description: List of product promo in cart

promoEntries.description: List of products for promo evaluation

userGroups.description: Any tags or groups belongs to user such as VIP, Wholesaler etc

isValid.description: Gets or sets the flag of promotion reward is valid. Also used as a flag for applicability (applied or potential)

description.description: Gets or sets the value of promotion reward description

couponAmount.description: Gets or sets the value of coupon amount

coupon.description: Gets or sets the value of coupon code

couponMinOrderAmount.description: Gets or sets the value of minimum order total cost for applying coupon

promotionId.description: Gets or sets the value of promotion id

rewardType.description: Gets or sets the value of promotion reward type

amountType.description: Gets or sets the value of promotion reward amount type

amount.description: Gets or sets the value of promotion reward amount

quantity.description: Gets or sets the value of line item quantity for applying promotion reward

lineItemId.description: Gets or sets the value of line item id

productId.description: Gets or sets the value of product id

conditionalProductId.description:
Conditional product
For N items of entry ProductId  in every Y items of entry ConditionalProductId get %X off

categoryId.description: Gets or sets the value of category id

measureUnit.description: Gets or sets the value of measurement unit

imageUrl.description: Gets or sets the value of promotion reward logo absolute URL

shippingMethod.description: Gets or sets the value of reward shipping method code

paymentMethod.description: Gets or sets the value of reward payment method code

maxLimit.description: Gets or sets the max limit for relative rewards

PromotionReward.description: need to backward compatibility with v.2

oauth2.description: OAuth2 Resource Owner Password Grant flow

http-signature.description: HTTP Signature authentication using Authorization header

basic.description: Basic authentication using username and password
